speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: SUPER! Hey there, [username]! Today your cyborg buddy Franky is gonna help you make a crunchy, saucy Veg American Chop Suey!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Let’s begin with the fried noodles—because nothing says SUPER like a crispy base!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Take your boiled noodles in a bowl. Add a pinch of salt and a good sprinkle of corn-starch.

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Mix well so every strand is coated. Coating equals crispiness, and crispiness equals SUPER!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Heat oil and deep-fry the noodles until they turn golden and crunchy. Oh yeah, hear that sizzle!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Take them out and keep them aside. We’ll use these beauties soon.

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Now let’s make the sauce—sweet, spicy, tangy… a SUPER combo!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Heat oil in a wok and add ginger, green chilli, and garlic. Give them a quick, powerful cyborg sauté!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Now toss in onion, carrot, cabbage, capsicum, red and yellow bell peppers, and baby corn. High heat, fast moves!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Stir-fry them for a minute. Keep it moving—don’t let those veggies lose their crunch!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Add soya sauce and let it caramelize. The aroma—SUPER delicious!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Now add tomato ketchup, red chilli sauce, black pepper powder, and water. Mix everything like a true craftsman!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Add a little sugar to balance the flavors. Even cyborgs appreciate harmony!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Bring the sauce to a boil. Let it bubble with confidence!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Now add the corn-starch slurry—this is what makes the sauce thick, glossy, and SUPER smooth.

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Mix well and cook for another minute. Add the coriander stems for a fresh, earthy kick.

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Switch off the heat. Your sauce is ready and looking fantastic!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Now it’s assembly time—my favorite part! SUPER presentation mode: ON!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Place the crisp fried noodles on a plate. Make sure they sit like a proud crunchy mountain!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Pour the hot, glossy sauce right over the noodles. Watch it cascade—it’s SUPER satisfying!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Garnish with fresh spring onion. A finishing touch worthy of a cyborg chef!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: And there you go, [username]—Veg American Chop Suey! Crispy! Saucy! SUPER!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: Serve hot and enjoy the glorious mix of textures. Even my metal heart warms up to this!

speaker: Franky
dialogue_text: You cooked like a true craftsman today. I’m proud of you… SUPER proud!
